title: Personal Rapid Transit for MTR
description: This resource pack adds the PRT to Minecraft Transit Railway 4.0.0
body:
This pack includes the PRT with 2 options.
The options are with or without destination & route number displays.

I made this pack since I needed a short train for my network, and this train happens to exist in real life.

# Important
This pack is made specifically for MTR 4.0.0, it will not work in MTR 3.2
